creator: woodsb02@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Dmitry Marakasov from comment #9)
> I need some more time to review and test the update, I'll process it next week.

Hi Dmitry,

I can do build testing to ensure it doesn't break any builds on any supported versions of FreeBSD. However, I am not in a position to do runtime testing.

If you are happy with me to only do build testing, I can confirm it is ok and then commit on your behalf if you like?

Regards,
Ben
